subject: Technology
title: Innovation Challenge
tagline: Identify a problem, brainstorm solutions and present your innovation!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is innovation?
options: Creating new ideas or improving existing ones
Identifying the problem
Generating many possible ideas
It shows if a solution actually works
stages.correctOption: Creating new ideas or improving existing ones
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Creating new ideas or improving existing ones is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Creating new ideas or improving existing ones.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What is the first step in the design process?
options: To repeat and refine a design
It shows if a solution actually works
It solves a real problem effectively
Identifying the problem

stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Identifying the problem.
